arts.ttl: Inter plan to renew contract of youngster Francesco Pio Esposito
arts.sum: Francesco Pio Esposito, the youngest of the Esposito brothers, is making waves while on loan at Spezia. The post Inter plan to renew contract of youngster Francesco Pio Esposito appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Journalist refutes Inter’s links with Napoli goalkeeper Alex Meret
arts.sum: A journalist trashes news report suggesting Inter’s contact with Napoli’s goalkeeper. Journalist Umberto Chiariello dumped a news article from La Gazzetta dello Sport, which reported about a potential complex situation…

arts.ttl: Denzel Dumfries opens up about contact renewal with Inter Milan
arts.sum: Inter Milan's right-back Denzel Dumfries recently spoke to Ziggo Sport in the Netherlands, discussing his contract renewal with the Nerazzurri and his experiences in Italy. The post Denzel Dumfries opens up about contact renewal with Inter Milan appeared first on FootItalia.com.
